mapper.select: SELECT sp.* FROM sub_package sp INNER JOIN parent_package_sub pps ON sp.id = pps.sub_package_id WHERE pps.parent_package_id = #{parentPackageId} ORDER BY sp.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM customer_order WHERE child_package_id = #{subPackageId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM customer_order WHERE parent_package_id = #{parentPackageId}
